nurtureTemplates.value_drop:
Hi {{name}},

I'm {{botName}}, assisting the office of {{tenantName}}.

I noticed you were asking about legal challenges. One quick insight from seeing cases unfold: Many people wait until a dispute escalates into litigation before seeking counsel. Getting advice an hour earlier often saves tens of thousands in court fees.

Just food for thought! No pitch here.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.testimonial:
Hey {{name}},

Brief story — {{tenantName}} just closed a matter for a client who was incredibly stressed about a very similar situation.

They reviewed the documents, found a leverage point the opposing side missed, and settled it quietly out of court.

Having the right set of eyes on the problem completely shifts the outcome.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.authority_transfer:
Hi {{name}},

I want to properly introduce you to {{tenantName}}.

They have been practicing in {{profession}} for {{years}}. Their most notable recent outcome: {{biggestWin}}. What makes their counsel different: {{differentiator}}.

They don't take every case. They specifically represent {{icp}}.

If that describes your situation, a quick consultation is worth your time.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.personal_checkin:
Hi {{name}},

Just a quick check-in — how is the situation progressing?

No agenda. {{tenantName}} just asked me to follow up with a few folks we've connected with recently to make sure things haven't escalated.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part1:
Hi {{name}},

Quick question.

On a scale of 1-10, how urgent is resolving this legal matter right now? (1 = Just exploring options, 10 = I need representation today).

Just reply with a number.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part2:
Understood, thank you.

What would it take to make that a 10? Are you waiting on documents, gathering funds, or just unsure if you actually have a case?

I want to make sure I get you the right resources.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.gap_closing:
Got it — {{answer}}.

That is incredibly common. {{tenantName}} actually resolves that specific hesitation frequently. 

Does knowing that we are highly equipped to navigate that bump up your 1-10 urgency at all?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.scarcity_takeaway:
Hi {{name}},

I'll be direct — {{tenantName}} limits their active caseload to ensure every client gets partner-level attention.

If you need counsel, let me know. If you've handled it or decided to hold off, totally fine. I just don't want to keep reaching out unnecessarily.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.pattern_interrupt:
Hi {{name}},

Before I close my file on our end, consider this.

In legal matters, the cost of doing nothing is rarely zero. The statute of limitations might be running, or the opposing party might be building their case while you wait.

If you want to review the actual facts instead of just worrying about them, say "Let's review."

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.final_takeaway:
Hi {{name}},

This is my final message. I'm removing you from my active follow-ups.

{{tenantName}} remains completely focused on their active clients. Best of luck with your situation!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.slow_drip_value:
Hi {{name}},

Checking in — just wanted to pass along a quick legal update in our field.

{{tenantName}} has been seeing shifts regarding {{differentiator}}. 

Hope your situation resolved smoothly. We're here if needed in the future.

— {{botName}}
